source_relative: Schottkys/Wolfspeed Power C3D CPW2 CPW3 SPICE Models/C3D16065D1.lib
raw_spice:
*******************************************************************************
**	DISCLAIMER
*******************************************************************************
**	This model is provided as is, where is, and with no warranty of any kind
**	either expressed or implied, including but not limited to any implied
**	warranties of merchantability and fitness for a particular purpose.
*******************************************************************************

***********************************************************
****	Wolfspeed SiC Schottky diode C3D16065D1 Spice Library
****	Version 1.0 Date: 11-22-2019
****
***********************************************************
****	Revision record
****	Version 1	Initial Release - Datasheet 08-2019
****
*********************************************************************************
.subckt C3D16065D1 NC A K Case Tj Tc 

.param p11 = -55
.param p12 = 500

R101 Tr 0	1E6
E101 Tr 0 	value {limit(V(Tj),p11,p12)}

**************
*Schottky diode
**************
L_anode1	A	AD1	6n 

xgAK	K	AD14	A	CAK_C3D16065D1
D1	AD14	K	D_C3D16065D1
*Rr1	AD13 	AD14	0.024
Er1 	AD13 	AD14	value {(731.2n*V(Tr)**2+127.8u*V(Tr)+28.661m)*v(net1)}
*Eth	AD12	AD13	value {0.98}
Eth	AD12	AD13	value {Limit((-16.005n*V(Tr)**3+4.0368u*V(Tr)**2-1.1887m*V(Tr)+0.89947),0,18)}
vdiode1	AD1	AD12	0

Esn1	net1	0	value {I(vdiode1)}
Rsn1	net1	0	1E6

R11	Case	K	0.1m
R11p	Case	K	0.1m

***********
*PiN diode2
***********

D2	AD4	K	PiN_C3D16065D1
Rn2	AD3 	AD4	0.010
*Eth2	AD2	AD3	value {9.3}
Eth2	AD2	AD3	value {Limit(-95.12n*V(Tr)**3+97.885u*V(Tr)**2-43.639m*V(Tr)+10.238,1,50)}
vdiode2	AD1 	AD2	0

Esn2	net2	0	value {I(vdiode2)}
Rsn2	net2	0	1E6

***********
*Breakdown voltage
***********
Ebd1	Ab1	A	value {Limit(-28.059u*V(Tr)**3+2.1927m*V(Tr)**2+0.42546*V(Tr)+1121.65,1000,1550)}
Dbd1	Ab2	Ab1	Bdown_C3D16065D1
Ebd2	Ab3	Ab2	value {
+			If (I(vdiode3)>260u,
+			1*I(vdiode3)
+			,
+			40K*I(vdiode3)
+			)
+			}
vdiode3	K 	Ab3	0

*Ebd3	net3	0	value {I(vdiode3)}
*Rsn3	net3	0	1E6

RAK	A	K	40E6

**********************************************************
.model D_C3D16065D1 d(vfwd=0.05 ron=0)

.model PiN_C3D16065D1 d(vfwd=0.05 ron=0)

.model Bdown_C3D16065D1 d(vfwd=0.05 ron=1m)

**********************************************************

Gheat	0	Tj	value {abs(V(AD12,K)*v(net1))+abs(V(AD2,K)*v(net2))}

R0 N1 Tj 0.109865
R1 N2 N1 0.465524
R2 N3 N2 0.157701
R3 Tc N3 0.13708

C0 Tj 0 1.166m
C1 N1 0 5.38m
C2 N2 0 24.39m
C3 N3 0 69.49m

.ends C3D16065D1

.subckt CAK_C3D16065D1 K AD14 A

.param Cjo = 1060p
.param Vj  = 0.6
.param M   = 0.435

G12 K d1 value {
+	if(V(K,A)>=0,
+		(Cjo/(1+(limit(v(K,A),0,285)/Vj)**M))*ddt(v(K,A));
+		,
+		0
+			)
+			}

R_CDS d1 AD14 1E-4

.ends CAK_C3D16065D1
